intent: Emphasize golden-hour warmth and atmosphere while keeping highlights controlled and avoiding orange overload.

tone_guidance.brightness: warm and luminous, but preserve sky and skin highlights
tone_guidance.shadows: slightly warm or neutral, not muddy

color_guidance.white_balance: warmer than neutral when the light supports it
color_guidance.blues: can stay slightly cool to preserve warm/cool contrast

parameter_strategy: Agent must infer concrete values per photo from preview analysis. Use this card as direction, not as a fixed preset.
